author.bio: I do Science(tm), mostly Physics. Interested in renewable energy, electric cars, technology, pro-EU. All views are my own. RTs do not mean agreement.
author.name: KJ Cheetham ❄️🔶

content.text:
A maths meme that is actually funny rather than stupid:
Solve carefully!
  230 - 220 x 0.5 =

You probably won’t believe it but the answer is 5!
#maths
